calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff BH Financial Services, Inc.'s motion for entry of judgment pursuant to written stipulation of all parties is granted. No opposition filed. BH has shown that it is entitled to a judgment in its favor and against defendant Sheldon Jefferson in the amount of $3,594.00, inclusive of attorney fees and costs and after application of credits due Mr. Jefferson. An order and judgment for the same are signed. (see order and judgment for full details).

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
